notes: Primary endpoint: FinnGen R12 cholelithiasis (laptop-friendly subset containing only UNION instrument rsIDs).
Key secondary endpoint: FinnGen R12 cholecystectomy (laptop-friendly subset containing only UNION instrument rsIDs).
Triangulation endpoint: UKB operation code for cholecystectomy/gall bladder removal (OpenGWAS variant-level query). Potential sample overlap with UKB-based HbA1c exposure GWAS.
Safety endpoint: FinnGen cholecystitis (OpenGWAS variant-level query; smaller sample than FinnGen R12).
Safety endpoint: FinnGen acute pancreatitis (OpenGWAS variant-level query; smaller sample than FinnGen R12).
